mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC) RNUM, NOTICE_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT, DATE_FORMAT(NOTICE_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS NOTICE_DATE FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_GUBUN = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NOTICE_GUBUN , NOTICE_TITLE , NOTICE_CONTENT , NOTICE_DATE , MEMBER_NO ) VALUES ( 1 , #{NOTICE_TITLE} , #{NOTICE_CONTENT} , NOW() , #{MEMBER_NO} )
mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{NOTICE_NO}
